item.title: New deepwater appetite: Iran war boosts demand for offshore rigs, says Noble
item.description: The Middle East war is igniting global interest in deepwater drilling, the company says

item.title: Halliburton wraps up Greenland frontier exploration deal
item.description: Greenland Energy targets two-well onshore drilling campaign this year

item.title: Shell strikes $16.4 billion deal to buy Canadian player
item.description: Operator of LNG Canada lands agreement to acquire Arc Resources, establishing Canada as new 'heartland'

item.title: Chinese offshore giant makes start on latest carbon capture project
item.description: CNOOC Ltd has reportedly started construction on Dongfang 1-1 CCUS

item.title: Iraq expedites pipeline plan amid Strait of Hormuz disruption
item.description: Iraqi Prime Minister approves funding and appoints body to oversee Basra-Haditha pipeline project

item.title: Operator drops CCS exploration permit in Norway
item.description: Partners in the proposed Iroko project relinquish offshore licence

item.title: Eni exploration chief picks out key wells for rest of 2026
item.description: Wells targeting 'material' resources will be drilled in Indonesia, Ghana and Egypt

item.title: Iraq's oil strategy must be built for disruption, not stability
item.description: Venandi founder and analyst Howar Talabany looks at Iraq's oil export options outside the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Shell’s flagship Dutch green hydrogen project is nearly complete. Can it be replicated across Europe?
item.description: Supermajor estimates around 500 similar-sized projects would be needed to meet the EU’s 2030 production target, but that it may not be as simple as a copy-paste approach

item.title: Flag day: Drillship fixed for rare Ghana deepwater exploration well
item.description: Dubai-based conglomerate set to spud probe in late 2026

item.title: UK industry defends North Sea role in energy security
item.description: Increased North Sea production could bolster domestic energy security, protect jobs and add value to the UK economy says trade body OEUK

item.title: US offshore driller boosts backlog and notes dayrate pattern
item.description: Noble says dayrate fixtures for tier-one drillships have increased moderately

item.title: High-profile Libya exploration well made 'non-commercial discovery'
item.description: Top Eni executive said results from Matsola-1 probe boost knowledge of frontier basin.

item.title: Zimbabwe player revives farm-out talks as big exploration well looms
item.description: Invictus Energy in discussions with companies about onshore assets, while preparing to spud Musuma-1 probe

item.title: Galp results meet forecasts as upstream earnings surge
item.description: Upstream production increased over 20% on last year

item.title: TotalEnergies to build $1.2 billion wind farm with Chinese turbines
item.description: Project will link 1 GW of onshore wind with major battery storage

item.title: 'Guiding force': Panoro chief executive Hamilton decides to retire
item.description: Eric d'Argentre will be new head of Africa-focused player

item.title: Seatrium completes latest divestment drive as part of wider cost reduction plan
item.description: Singapore fabrication specialist confirms that all asset divestments under 23 February disclosure have been completed

item.title: New greenfield integrated offshore gas development shaping up in Asia
item.description: Adani Welspun venture operates several key oil and gas assets in India's Mumbai and Kutch offshore region

item.title: Markets shrug as new sanctions levied on Iran ahead of weekend talks with US
item.description: The US is dispatching envoys to Pakistan to meet Iranian officials and discuss an end to the war

item.title: Baker Hughes wins deal for major Middle East player’s LNG expansion effort
item.description: Oilfield contractor picks up gas turbine and compressor contract for QatarEnergy’s North Field West development

item.title: SLB buys S&P Global Energy's upstream software business
item.description: SLB plotting aggressive digital and AI strategy as its data centre business booms

item.title: Baker Hughes projects further Middle East revenue drop amid new ‘structural reality’ for oil and gas
item.description: CFO predicts another 20% fall in regional haul even if US-Israel war with Iran resolves by June

item.title: Bolivia’s state player gets new head after CEO resigns less than a month in the job
item.description: Bolivian president appoints new YPFB chief executive amid economic crisis

item.title: SLB profits drop as Middle East war marks ‘challenging start of the year’
item.description: Company expects post-conflict oil prices to remain above pre-conflict levels

item.title: EU widens sanctions on Russian energy sector
item.description: EU's latest package targets regional oil producers, Russian oil refineries and Gazprom subsidiaries

item.title: Ecopetrol buys 26% stake in Brazilian oil company for $550 million
item.description: Colombian player set to launch tender offer to take control of Brava Energia

item.title: Vietnam offshore gas EPCIC awarded to domestic player
item.description: Vietnam progresses with the development of phase 2 of its Su Tu Trang gas field

item.title: Drillship arrives in Namibia for potential two-well campaign
item.description: Saipem rig is set to work for Rhino Resources

item.title: COSL eyes EPC opportunities in Americas and SE Asia amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Chinese oilfield service provider says impact of conflict on Middle East operations starting to emerge
